entries.title: CVE-2026-8231 | CodeAstro Online Catering Ordering System 1.0 /deleteorder.php ID sql injection
entries.summary: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical , has been found in CodeAstro Online Catering Ordering System 1.0 . This affects an unknown function of the file /deleteorder.php . The manipulation of the argument ID leads to sql injection. This vulnerability is uniquely identified as CVE-2026-8231 . The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. Moreover, an exploit is present.

entries.title: CVE-2026-8230 | Wavlink NU516U1 240425 /cgi-bin/login.cgi sys_login1 ipaddr os command injection

entries.title: Active attack: Dirty Frag Linux vulnerability expands post-compromise risk

entries.title: ReTokSync：面向生成式语言隐写的自同步分词消歧方法

entries.title: New Linux PamDOORa Backdoor Uses PAM Modules to Steal SSH Credentials
entries.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new Linux backdoor named PamDOORa that's being advertised on the Rehub Russian cybercrime forum for $1,600 by a threat actor called "darkworm." The backdoor is designed as a Pluggable Authentication Module (PAM)-based post-exploitation toolkit that enables persistent SSH access by means of a magic password and specific TCP port combination.

entries.title: 用Agent评测思路管理AI Coding —— 31万行代码AI重构的实践

entries.title: 现代恶意软件内幕：2026 年规避技术正如何演进
entries.summary: 深入剖析 2026 年恶意软件规避检测的技术全景：从加壳与混淆、沙箱规避、就地取材（LOLBin），到分阶段载荷、行为绕过与复合攻击链，并给出现代 EDR/XDR 真正有效的检测思路与 SOC 实战建议。

entries.title: 用 LibAFL 扩展 Ruzzy - Trail of Bits 博客
